sections.location: The smoke detectors are located outside the entrances to the bedrooms as well as in the kitchen.
The water heater is located in the closet under the stairs.
The circuit breaker is located in the attic space which can be accessed through the door in the upstairs bedroom. Its on the wall to your left.
The main water shut off is usually located at the end of the driveway near the curb.

tips.text:
Test smoke detectors at least once a month using the test button.

Change batteries when smoke detector beeps.
If a breaker trips, switch it fully OFF then back ON to reset.
Replace the filter every 60-90 days, or more often if you have pets.
